ingredients.text: mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids

ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
49% cheesecake (51% full fat soft cheese ( milk ), water, inulin, maltodextrin, palm oil,  milk  proteins, tapioca starch, sugar, palm kernel oil, emulsifiers (mono and diglycerides of fatty acids, polyglycerol esters of fatty acids), stabiliser (carboxymethyl cellulose),  wheat  fibre, acidity regulator (lactic acid)), 
30% toffee topping (water, dark brown sugar, partially inverted sugar syrup, sweetened condensed  milk , butter ( milk ), modified maize starch, salt, caramelised sugar syrup, acidity regulator (lactic acid), flavouring), 
18% biscuit base ( wheat  flour, sugar, palm oil, invert sugar syrup demerara sugar, whey powder ( milk ), raising agent: sodium carbonates), 
3% milk chocolate curls (sugar, cocoa butter, whole  milk  powder, cocoa mass, lactose ( milk ), whey powder ( milk ), emulsifier ( soya  lecithin), flavouring)
